review_title: Perfect tool for us
description: ForceManager is the tool HUNE has long been in search of, with a view to fully measuring the efficiency of our sales team. We are very happy with the application, as is our sales team, since it saves them a great deal of time in terms of reporting
author: Marta T.

review_title: Forcemanager, a go to for mobile sales!
description: Awesome! Their Support is incredible and fast.
author: Danyel B.
pros: Mobile interface is fast and super easy of use!
cons: No out of the box native LinkedIn integration.

review_title: This has been a good platform for staff to document & share details of sales visits with customers
description: Better tracking of sales person activity
author: Jessica S.
pros: The ability to track sales staff activities, and for them to upload customer documents & photos to share with other staff.
cons: Lack of "notifications" when documents etc are added to a particular customer. It would be nice if you could set up an email notification when a sales person or support staff add documents to a particular client.

review_title: Force Manager, a Nice Tools for Sales executives and their Managers
description: ForceManeger can help all sales with their acurate Pilplines, with clear Forecatss and good Reportring to the Sales management and sales Organisation. Help also to follow sales weekly tasks, help to secure the deals and help Manager to follow the sales efforts and close Projects.
author: Tarek M.
pros: A very god and easy tool to mange the Sales Teritory, boost your Pipeline, Follow the Sales cycle and execute Sales palnning with acurate Producrt and ammounts, to save deal and close them with clear view and planning.
cons: ForceManager is easy to adop and to use daily.

review_title: The perfect AI driven sales assistant and CRM.
description: This is the perfect fit for our hybrid work situation and the AI Sales Assistant is such an asset when interacting with the CRM to accomplish and get intelligence on your day to day activities.
author: Danyel B.
pros: Truly built for ease of use, mobility and the new hybrid sales reality. Support is incredible.
cons: Nothing really. Some higher end features do require customization from the ForceManager, but only if you are adamant about things following a very specific model.

review_title: Force Manager App
author: Roman B.
pros: Ease of use. Ease of custom software to our needs with the help of support team. Mobile App is awesome.
cons: It would be great if incoming calls and outgoing calls are automatically registered even when running the app in the background only. Happened a couple of times where I wasn't able to check-in when out on the road as it didn't pick up my location.

review_title: Good Software and Reliable
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Works offline, Syncs simply across platforms and devices. Very few issues. Ties all users data together.
cons: Slightly different views and actions available on Ipad/Iphone/Web versions, which is slightly confusing. Also be great to have prompts to remind that you haven't contacted someone in a set time frame.

review_title: Not a recommended option
description: Below average.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It serves as an acceptable portal for keeping customer records.
cons: The layout, functionality and capabilities are all sub par.
author_profession: Project Leader/Marketing Professional Commercial Truck Marketing

review_title: A must have app for our business
description: I've been using ForceManager for more than 5 months and It actually improved the way I work. As a self eployed I used other CRM tools but this one fits in my daily workflow, helping me have access to all my clients and see when was the last time I visit them and what I talked about with them. Just really helpfull to keep me even more motivated when I built relationships with them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Hassle free when start using it in your daily habits
cons: None so far, maybe that the Android version looks a bit different than the one on my iPad but I mostly use my iPad.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Value
description: Thanks to ForceManager, we can ascertain the effectiveness and conversion rate of the promotional campaigns we design for our network in real time.
author: Eduardo M.

review_title: El CRM más completo
author: Candela G.
pros: CRM muy intuitivo, permite tener todos los datos de los clientes organizados, hacer análisis a través de la IA. Es el más completo de los que he probado.
cons: hay veces que la sincronización de llamadas no funciona de manera totalmente efectiva, hace falta meterse en la app y actualizar

review_title: Genial. !!! Lo recomiendo a las empresas que conozco
description: Maneja sin mayor problema la BBD de nuestros 12.200 clientes a través de nuestros 42 comerciales
author: José María H.
pros: Me parece el más intuitivo y con mejor usabilidad de todos lo que probé antes de decidirme por FM.
cons: La verdad es que no tiene muchos defectos, únicamente que para ir fluido en la versión móvil necesita de al menos 6gb de RAM, ideal 8 Gb para sacar el máximo partido en cuanto a fluidez.

review_title: Sage Sales Management, un CRM a la altura de lo esperado
description: Un CRM de un nivel excelente, con asistente de IA, que ayuda a poder gestionar mejor el tiempo, y enfocarte en lo que realmente importa.
author: Victor M.
pros: La facilidad de uso y lo intuitivo que es, me ayuda mucho a poder gestionar todos mis contactos con facilidad y rapidez.
cons: Nada, resuelve perfectamente mis necesidades, se adapta a todo lo que necesito y es exactamente lo que espero de un CRM
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gran CRM para empresas de todo tipo y tamaño
description: Muy buena, llevamos varios años utilizándolo con grandes resultados. Tienen un equipo muy involucrado con el cliente.
author: Antonio F.
pros: Sistema muy flexible y sencillo de emplear. Se adapta a cualquier forma de trabajo y continuamente están innovando (por ejemplo añadiendo AI generativa).
cons: Algunas funciones como el control de permisos están disponibles a partir del segundo tier.

review_title: Saber lo que tu equipo sabe y hace con tus clientes
description: El programa bien, el soporte no tanto. Los cambios de versiones han provocado algún problema.
author: Josep Miquel G.
pros: La facilidad de los reportes de visita por voz.
cons: La integración con datos de terceros, para presupuestos, pedidos, correos electrónicos,…

review_title: Herramienta Genial para gestion de Ventas en Campo
description: Facilidad, rapidez y sencilles, es muy intuitivo trabajar en la computadora o en el telefono y al mismo tiempo con la tablet
author: Jesus Edgardo D.
pros: Su facilidad de uso y manejo de las gestiones de ventas, como seguimientos y dar cierre a proyectos, muestra de una manera grafica e intuitiva el avance en los KPIS
cons: en General lo veo como una herramiente altamente eficiente, con la cual puedo trabajar mas rapido y con enfoque en poryectis de alto valor.

review_title: Totalmente recomendable
description: Mi experiencia con Sage Sales Management ha sido muy positiva. La plataforma es intuitiva y facilita la gestión de oportunidades de venta, seguimiento de clientes y análisis de rendimiento comercial. Me ha permitido automatizar tareas repetitivas, mejorar la colaboración entre equipos y tomar decisiones basadas en datos en tiempo real. La integración con otras herramientas de Sage también ha sido fluida, lo que ha optimizado nuestros procesos internos. Aunque al principio requirió algo de formación, el soporte técnico fue eficiente. En general, ha contribuido significativamente a mejorar nuestra productividad y eficiencia en el área comercial.
author: Roberto C.
pros: Funcionalidad y eficacia, todo al alcance de cualquiera, software totalmente recomendable, es un crm sin fallos
cons: Complejo de primeras pero luego muy fácil de entender, no obstante es sencillo y cualquiera podria manejarlo
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excelente y buena
description: Muy buena. Su equipo es atento, resuelven los problemas con la mayor brevedad posible e intentan ayudarnos siempre
author: Federico D.
pros: Poder reportar con voz prácticamente todo lo que hacemos. Planificarme las visitas de toda la semana en función de mis objetivos.
cons: Pocas, ya que todo o casi todo lo que planteamos acaba sucediendo. Lo único es poder sincronizar pronto los calendarios.

review_title: Buen programa para conseguir los objetivos comerciales de la empresa
description: Muy satisfecha, facilita mucho los procesos y la supervisión de los objetivos comerciales.
author: Amaya A.
pros: Su falicidad de uso, las métricas y la agrupación de actividades con clientes como emails y llamadas.
cons: Como todo programa, hay que pasar por el proceso de implantación.

review_title: El CRM que te ayuda a mejorar día a día.
description: Muy buena experiencia, una app muy completa que me ayuda en el día a día.
author: Miguel Ángel H.
pros: El control que se tiene de todos los clientes previamente llenándolo de información.
cons: No poder ampliar la pantalla en la app del móvil.

review_title: Sandra Cassini
description: Me encanta esta herramienta sobre todo el sistema para hacer entrevistas
author: SANDRA C.
pros: Poder recopilar la información del cliente en un informe.
cons: Me gustan todas las herramientas,no veo desventajas

review_title: ForceManager is a good application. Their versatility will be very useful
description: As a group we believe that you need drastic changes to this App, since it needs the labor of certain experts to solve some errors that the software brings, in conclusion it is still in a beta state.
author: Andres R.
pros: It has a great variety of details in favor, how its good interaction in the interface, and the high range of tools that this software has, make that the idea is a great sample of what this App will be, also without counting the good technical support.
cons: It has some aspects that disgust how the fact that its design is very simple, bland and rustic, another thing is that in its range of tools there are some options that are somewhat unnecessary and a little useless within that range.

review_title: Simple and effective CRM
description: A quick view to check the activity of each client
author: Mario D.
pros: The inferface is easy to use and friendly. Even the mobile apps for iOS are well designed too
cons: The cost of multiple users, even if we have different roles, we should pay as the most expensive role to all of use

review_title: Forcemanager powerful tool
author: Andres A.
pros: after trying several CRM I'm very happy with FORCEMANAGER is an intuitive and easy-to-use tool, without a doubt a true sales reinforcement. also helps us optimize the time and collaboration of my team to be more efficient.
cons: The truth is that I love this tool is quite intuitive, you do with it quickly. the technical service is absolute 10 very fast and very professional, they have clarified my doubts in a matter of minutes.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: very good tool
author: Diana Maria E.
pros: intuitive and easy to use tool, to sell in an organized way, with autonomy and monitoring of your activity. very good for commercial use, it saves me time and useful to do a correct management of clients
cons: great application to manage the use of my equipment at work, for now very happy with the trial version, a more than likely acquisition
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
